'''âw-p-k''' ('''kawapak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rib|rib]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rib|rib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-p-k
|-
! Lemma
| kawapak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwapak|thiwapak]] || [[word:jiwapak|jiwapak]] || [[word:shiwapak|shiwapak]] || [[word:kiwapak|kiwapak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwapak|thuthuwapak]] || [[word:jujuwapak|jujuwapak]] || [[word:shushuwapak|shushuwapak]] || [[word:kukuwapak|kukuwapak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwapak|thuwapak]] || [[word:juwapak|juwapak]] || [[word:shuwapak|shuwapak]] || [[word:kuwapak|kuwapak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwapak|thuwapak]] || [[word:juwapak|juwapak]] || [[word:shuwapak|shuwapak]] || [[word:kuwapak|kuwapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewapak|thewapak]] || [[word:jewapak|jewapak]] || [[word:shewapak|shewapak]] || [[word:kewapak|kewapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowapak|thothowapak]] || [[word:jojowapak|jojowapak]] || [[word:shoshowapak|shoshowapak]] || [[word:kokowapak|kokowapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowapak|thowapak]] || [[word:jowapak|jowapak]] || [[word:showapak|showapak]] || [[word:kowapak|kowapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowapak|thowapak]] || [[word:jowapak|jowapak]] || [[word:showapak|showapak]] || [[word:kowapak|kowapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚwapak|thĂŚwapak]] || [[word:jĂŚwapak|jĂŚwapak]] || [[word:shĂŚwapak|shĂŚwapak]] || [[word:kĂŚwapak|kĂŚwapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawapak|thathawapak]] || [[word:jajawapak|jajawapak]] || [[word:shashawapak|shashawapak]] || [[word:kakawapak|kakawapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawapak|thawapak]] || [[word:jawapak|jawapak]] || [[word:shawapak|shawapak]] || [[word:kawapak|kawapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawapak|thawapak]] || [[word:jawapak|jawapak]] || [[word:shawapak|shawapak]] || [[word:kawapak|kawapak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawapak|shawapak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawapak|goshawapak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawapak|gokishawapak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawapaknĂź|shawapaknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawapaknknĂź|goshawapaknknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapaknĂź|gokishawapaknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawapakshĂŤ|shawapakshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawapaknkshĂŤ|goshawapaknkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawapakshĂŤ|gokishawapakshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapakro|shawapakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapaknkro|goshawapaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapakro|gokishawapakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapakmu|shawapakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapaknkmu|goshawapaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapakmu|gokishawapakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawapaksher|shawapaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawapaknksher|goshawapaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawapaksher|gokishawapaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawapakng|shawapakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawapaknkng|goshawapaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawapakng|gokishawapakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawapakya|shawapakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawapaknkya|goshawapaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawapakya|gokishawapakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawapakyam|shawapakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawapaknkyam|goshawapaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawapakyam|gokishawapakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapaknĂźshĂŤ|shawapaknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapaknknĂźshĂŤ|goshawapaknknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapaknĂźshĂŤ|gokishawapaknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapaknĂźro|shawapaknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapaknknĂźro|goshawapaknknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapaknĂźro|gokishawapaknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapaknĂźmu|shawapaknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapaknknĂźmu|goshawapaknknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapaknĂźmu|gokishawapaknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapakshĂŤnĂź|shawapakshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapaknkshĂŤnĂź|goshawapaknkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapakshĂŤnĂź|gokishawapakshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapakshĂŤro|shawapakshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapaknkshĂŤro|goshawapaknkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapakshĂŤro|gokishawapakshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapakshĂŤmu|shawapakshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapaknkshĂŤmu|goshawapaknkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapakshĂŤmu|gokishawapakshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapakronĂź|shawapakronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapaknkronĂź|goshawapaknkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapakronĂź|gokishawapakronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapakroshĂŤ|shawapakroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapaknkroshĂŤ|goshawapaknkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapakroshĂŤ|gokishawapakroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawapakromu|shawapakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawapaknkromu|goshawapaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawapakromu|gokishawapakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawapakmunĂź|shawapakmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawapaknkmunĂź|goshawapaknkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawapakmunĂź|gokishawapakmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawapakmushĂŤ|shawapakmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawapaknkmushĂŤ|goshawapaknkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawapakmushĂŤ|gokishawapakmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawapakmuro|shawapakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawapaknkmuro|goshawapaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawapakmuro|gokishawapakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
